description: Composition Red round neck jersey made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, diagonal panel stitch in white across the chest and branding on left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This jersey from puma with its easy silhouette and fabric falls neatly over your shoulders. Simple and classy, pair this piece with fitted denims and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
